## Source: amazon-inspector (abcff950068cf454cf07ead8614f95dd6291f4204f72ada102c7b4c3d72c0cd1)
The package partner-tracker-api was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (86ba1678615a78fcd765cba3f469005dcf5c47d9b80755f4d42fe3d0a5967c8b)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'partner-tracker-api' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
